name: Peanut- Butterscotch Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Stir in the flour.
3. Press the mixture into an ungreased 9 x 13 x 2 inch pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.
5. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and corn syrup. Heat to boiling and remove from heat.
6. Add the butterscotch chips and peanut butter to the boiling mixture. Stir until the bits are melted.
7. Stir in the Corn Flakes.
8. Spread the topping evenly over the baked layer.
9. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
